dirs.description: Directories to make accessible inside JupyterLab, separated by commas

env.description: Image or conda env to run inside, for example rfdiffusion.

ip.description: IP address to bind Jupyter server to

no_unix_sockets.description: Disable use of file-based unix sockets for Jupyter server

socket_dir.description: Custom directory for Jupyter server sockets (optional)

run_parameters.description: Additional parameters to pass to JupyterLab when starting the server

cpus.description: Number of CPUs to allocate for the JupyterLab server

memory.description: Amount of memory to allocate for the JupyterLab server (e.g., '32 GB')

queue.description: Non-default queue or partition where to submit the JupyterLab job

cluster_options.description: Additional cluster options to pass when submitting the JupyterLab job (e.g., '-l select=ncpus=4:mem=15gb')
